'''Aidus''' was a [[Rattataki/Legends|Rattataki]] warrior who lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He was a loyal subject of the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] when, in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> they imprisoned [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and his clone officer [[Alpha (Advanced Recon Commando)|Alpha-17]] in their fortress on Rattatak.<ref name="Republic 60">[[Republic 60|''Republic'' 60]]</ref>
